message:
🐛 Fix Playwright RED: Nightly RCE vector scan on Firefox (#11036)

Two Firefox-specific issues caused the nightly RCE vector scan to fail:

1. Phase 2d (inline scripts check): page.evaluate() had no try/catch,
   so Firefox's execution context destruction during navigation threw
   an unhandled error that aborted the entire test.

2. Phase 9 (shell metacharacter loop): when Firefox destroyed the
   execution context during rapid navigations, the catch handler
   returned false, recording a HIGH-severity 'fail' that tripped the
   highFails budget assertion. Fixed by retrying once after
   re-navigation, then downgrading to 'warn' since context
   destruction is a browser quirk, not a security finding.

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
